about.pageDescription: Learn about Cold Flyer — Bangladesh's leading HVAC solutions provider.
about.heroSub: From residential cooling to large-scale commercial HVAC, we deliver precision climate solutions tailored to Bangladesh's unique environment.

values.sustainableEfficiencyDesc: Reduce your energy costs by up to 40% with our smart thermal systems designed for Bangladesh's climate.
values.lifetimeSupportDesc: From day one to year ten and beyond — ongoing service, maintenance, and emergency support across all districts.
values.oemStandardsDesc: Genuine manufacturer parts ensure your system performs exactly as engineered, with full warranty coverage.
values.expertTeamDesc: Our certified technicians are trained on the latest HVAC technologies and understand local installation requirements.

about.journeyDesc: Founded with a vision to transform Bangladesh's cooling industry, Cold Flyer has grown from a small workshop in Dhaka to a nationwide network serving thousands of homes and businesses.
about.year2020: Founded in Dhaka with 5 team members
about.year2022: Expanded to all 64 districts of Bangladesh
about.year2024: Launched premium brand partnerships & e-commerce platform
about.year2026: Leading HVAC marketplace with 200+ brands and 500+ certified technicians
